23UENUM(BlueprintType)
24namespace EEasingFunc
25{
26 enum Type : int
27 {
29 Linear,
30
32 Step,
33
35 SinusoidalIn,
36
38 SinusoidalOut,
39
41 SinusoidalInOut,
42
44 EaseIn,
45
47 EaseOut,
48
50 EaseInOut,
51
53 ExpoIn,
54
56 ExpoOut,
57
59 ExpoInOut,
60
62 CircularIn,
63
65 CircularOut,
66
68 CircularInOut,
69
70 };
71}

110USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
111struct FFloatSpringState
112{
113 GENERATED_BODY()
114
115 float PrevTarget;
116 float Velocity;
117 bool bPrevTargetValid;
118
119 FFloatSpringState()
120 : PrevTarget(0.f)
121 , Velocity(0.f)
122 , bPrevTargetValid(false)
123 {
124 }
125
126 void Reset()
127 {
128 PrevTarget = Velocity = 0.f;
129 bPrevTargetValid = false;
130 }
131};
132
133USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
134struct FVectorSpringState
135{
136 GENERATED_BODY()
137
138 FVector PrevTarget;
139 FVector Velocity;
140 bool bPrevTargetValid;
141
142 FVectorSpringState()
143 : PrevTarget(FVector::ZeroVector)
144 , Velocity(FVector::ZeroVector)
145 , bPrevTargetValid(false)
146 {
147 }
148
149 void Reset()
150 {
151 PrevTarget = Velocity = FVector::ZeroVector;
152 bPrevTargetValid = false;
153 }
154};
155
156USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
157struct FQuaternionSpringState
158{
159 GENERATED_BODY()
160
161 FQuat PrevTarget;
162 FVector AngularVelocity;
163 bool bPrevTargetValid;
164
165 FQuaternionSpringState()
166 : PrevTarget(FQuat::Identity)
167 , AngularVelocity(FVector::ZeroVector)
168 , bPrevTargetValid(false)
169 {
170 }
171
172 void Reset()
173 {
174 PrevTarget = FQuat::Identity;
175 AngularVelocity = FVector::ZeroVector;
176 bPrevTargetValid = false;
177 }
178};

188UCLASS(meta=(BlueprintThreadSafe, ScriptName = "MathLibrary"), MinimalAPI)
189class UKismetMathLibrary : public UBlueprintFunctionLibrary
190{
191 GENERATED_UCLASS_BODY()
192
193 //
194 // Boolean functions.
195 //
196
197
198 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category="Math|Random", meta=(NotBlueprintThreadSafe))
199 static UE_INL_API bool RandomBool();
200
205 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Random", meta=(Weight = "0.5", NotBlueprintThreadSafe))
206 static ENGINE_API bool RandomBoolWithWeight(float Weight);
207
212 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Random", meta=(Weight = "0.5", ScriptMethod = "RandomBoolWithWeight", ScriptMethodMutable))
213 static ENGINE_API bool RandomBoolWithWeightFromStream(const FRandomStream& RandomStream, float Weight);
214
215 UE_DEPRECATED(5.2, "Use RandomBoolWithWeightFromStream taking the FRandomStream as the first argument.")
216 static UE_INL_API bool RandomBoolWithWeightFromStream(float Weight, const FRandomStream& RandomStream)
217 {
218 return RandomBoolWithWeightFromStream(RandomStream, Weight);
219 }
220

511 //
512 // Float functions.
513 //
514
516 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, meta = (DisplayName = "Power"), Category = "Math|Float")
517 static UE_INL_API double MultiplyMultiply_FloatFloat(double Base, double Exp);
518
520 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, meta = (DisplayName = "int * float", CompactNodeTitle = "*", Keywords = "* multiply"), Category = "Math|Float")
521 static UE_INL_API double Multiply_IntFloat(int32 A, double B);
522
524 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, CustomThunk, meta = (DisplayName = "% (Float)", CompactNodeTitle = "%", Keywords = "% modulus"), Category = "Math|Float")
525 static ENGINE_API double Percent_FloatFloat(double A, double B = 1.f);
526
527 static ENGINE_API double GenericPercent_FloatFloat(double A, double B);
528
530 DECLARE_FUNCTION(execPercent_FloatFloat)
531 {
532 P_GET_PROPERTY(FDoubleProperty, A);
533 P_GET_PROPERTY(FDoubleProperty, B);
534
535 P_FINISH;
536
537 if (B == 0.f)
538 {
539 FFrame::KismetExecutionMessage(*FString::Printf(TEXT("Modulo by zero detected: %f %% 0\n%s"), A, *Stack.GetStackTrace()), ELogVerbosity::Warning);
540 *(double*)RESULT_PARAM = 0;
541 return;
542 }
543
544 *(double*)RESULT_PARAM = GenericPercent_FloatFloat(A, B);
545 }
546

2002 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Random", meta=(NotBlueprintThreadSafe))
2003 static UE_INL_API FVector RandomUnitVectorInConeInRadians(FVector ConeDir, float ConeHalfAngleInRadians);
2004
2010 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Random", meta=(NotBlueprintThreadSafe))
2011 static inline FVector RandomUnitVectorInConeInDegrees(FVector ConeDir, float ConeHalfAngleInDegrees)
2012 {
2013 return RandomUnitVectorInConeInRadians(ConeDir, FMath::DegreesToRadians(ConeHalfAngleInDegrees));
2014 }
2015
2023 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Random", meta = (Keywords = "RandomVector Pitch Yaw", NotBlueprintThreadSafe))
2024 static ENGINE_API FVector RandomUnitVectorInEllipticalConeInRadians(FVector ConeDir, float MaxYawInRadians, float MaxPitchInRadians);
2025
2033 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Random", meta = (Keywords = "RandomVector Pitch Yaw", NotBlueprintThreadSafe))
2034 static inline FVector RandomUnitVectorInEllipticalConeInDegrees(FVector ConeDir, float MaxYawInDegrees, float MaxPitchInDegrees)
2035 {
2036 return RandomUnitVectorInEllipticalConeInRadians(ConeDir, FMath::DegreesToRadians(MaxYawInDegrees), FMath::DegreesToRadians(MaxPitchInDegrees));
2037 }

4594 static ENGINE_API int32 Convert3DTo1D(const FIntVector& Index3D, int32 XSize, int32 YSize);
4595
4596 // NetQuantized vector make/breaks
4597 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Vector", meta = (NativeMakeFunc))
4598 static UE_INL_API FVector_NetQuantize MakeVector_NetQuantize(double X, double Y, double Z) { return FVector_NetQuantize(X, Y, Z); }
4599 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Vector", meta = (NativeMakeFunc))
4600 static UE_INL_API FVector_NetQuantize10 MakeVector_NetQuantize10(double X, double Y, double Z) { return FVector_NetQuantize10(X, Y, Z); }
4601 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Vector", meta = (NativeMakeFunc))
4602 static UE_INL_API FVector_NetQuantize100 MakeVector_NetQuantize100(double X, double Y, double Z) { return FVector_NetQuantize100(X, Y, Z); }
4603 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Vector", meta = (NativeMakeFunc))
4604 static UE_INL_API FVector_NetQuantizeNormal MakeVector_NetQuantizeNormal(double X, double Y, double Z) { return FVector_NetQuantizeNormal(X, Y, Z); }
4605 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Vector", meta = (NativeBreakFunc))
4606 static UE_INL_API void BreakVector_NetQuantize(FVector_NetQuantize InVec, double& X, double& Y, double& Z) { BreakVector((FVector)InVec, X, Y, Z); }
4607 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Vector", meta = (NativeBreakFunc))
4608 static UE_INL_API void BreakVector_NetQuantize10(FVector_NetQuantize10 InVec, double& X, double& Y, double& Z) { BreakVector((FVector)InVec, X, Y, Z); }
4609 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Vector", meta = (NativeBreakFunc))
4610 static UE_INL_API void BreakVector_NetQuantize100(FVector_NetQuantize100 InVec, double& X, double& Y, double& Z) { BreakVector((FVector)InVec, X, Y, Z); }
4611 UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Math|Vector", meta = (NativeBreakFunc))
4612 static UE_INL_API void BreakVector_NetQuantizeNormal(FVector_NetQuantizeNormal InVec, double& X, double& Y, double& Z) { BreakVector((FVector)InVec, X, Y, Z); }
4613
4614private:
4615
4616 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Divide_ByteByte();
4617 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Percent_ByteByte();
4618 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Divide_IntInt();
4619 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Divide_FloatFloat();
4620 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Divide_DoubleDouble();
4621 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Divide_Int64Int64();
4622 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Percent_IntInt();
4623 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Percent_Int64Int64();
4624 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Sqrt();
4625 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Divide_VectorFloat();
4626 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Divide_VectorInt();
4627 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Divide_VectorVector();
4628 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_ProjectVectorOnToVector();
4629 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Divide_IntPointOnInt();
4630 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Divide_IntPointOnIntPoint();
4631 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Divide_Vector2DFloat();
4632 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_Divide_Vector2DVector2D();
4633 static ENGINE_API void ReportError_DaysInMonth();
4634};
